'''Johrian whiskey''' was a blue-green [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage<ref name="CSWE" /> from the [[Johria system/Legends|Johria system]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> [[Lorn Pavan]] enjoyed it, as did [[Den Dhur]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|169|Johrian whiskey}}</ref>

==Appearances==

*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
